message:
🐛 Fix CNCF scan: JSON parsing, pattern matching, frontend keywords

- Save gh pr list output as proper JSON array (not JSONL)
- Fix bash arithmetic errors from empty grep counts
- Expand pattern regex with frontend-relevant keywords (cypress,
  playwright, react, typescript, dashboard, bundle, lazy, etc.)
- Add PR count logging per repo for debugging
- Broaden notable PR filter to catch UI/frontend/component PRs

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
